description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a modern yet classic design, featuring a brick facade, large windows, and a prominent attached garage. The front yard is landscaped with trees and shrubs, and a paved driveway leads to the garage. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, surrounded by additional greenery. The house has a gable roof with multiple dormer windows, and the window arrangement is mostly symmetrical. The entryway is marked by a covered porch with columns and steps leading up to a central front door. The interior layout is partially visible, showing multiple rooms on both floors, and the property is accompanied by a detached modern structure, possibly a guest house or garage.
description: A two-story suburban house with a brick facade, gable roof, attached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard patio with a pool. The design blends modern and classic elements, with symmetrical windows and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main house, attached garage, driveway, landscaped front yard, and a detached modern structure.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and the rear facade of the house.
description_view_2: Back and opposite side view focusing on the backyard, pool, and the rear entry to the house, with trees and landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the backyard, pool, patio area, and the rear elevation of the house with large windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with covered porch, columns, and steps
